Final pre-receipt run passed 17 of 17 tests with zero failed, skipped, or cancelled tests.

commands_actually_run.command: curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:43173/ and the five linked static assets
commands_actually_run.details: The production page and every JavaScript/CSS module returned successfully from the local server.

commands_actually_run.command: cmp each src production asset with its dist counterpart
commands_actually_run.details: All six built assets matched their final source files.
No external URLs or network-write APIs were found in application source.

checks.name: Automated behavior suite
checks.evidence: 17 tests cover the cap, empty input, complete/incomplete toggling, complete-state calculation, removal, safe reset confirmation, per-mutation persistence, reload, local rollover, malformed data, invalid schemas, stale saves, and unavailable storage.

checks.name: Production build
checks.evidence: npm run build produced a locally served six-file dist/ artifact.

checks.name: 390px responsive and interaction check
checks.evidence: Browser inspection found viewport width and document scroll width both 390px; keyboard entry, pointer entry, cap state, toggle, remove, reset, field error semantics, and focus restoration were exercised.

checks.name: 1280px responsive and complete-state check
checks.evidence: Browser inspection found viewport width and document scroll width both 1280px; the constrained 736px layout and three-check complete state were verified.

checks.name: Reload persistence smoke check
checks.evidence: Three priorities and a completed checkbox remained intact after a production-page reload.

checks.name: External network/resource check
checks.evidence: The rendered page exposed no HTTP(S) external resources, and static source inspection found no network-write APIs.

checks.name: Independent user review or validation
checks.evidence: Out of scope for this controlled local implementation run; no user-validation claim is made.

known_limitations: Persistence is intentionally limited to one browser profile on one device; it does not sync across browsers or devices.
If browser local storage is blocked or unavailable, the current visit remains usable but cannot survive reload; the UI shows a warning.
Calendar rollover is based on the device's local clock and timezone.
The default port was unavailable in this environment, so the verified production server used DAYMARK_PORT=43173.
external_actions_not_taken: No contact with any person or organization.
No backend, analytics, notifications, collaboration service, or external asset integration.
No package installation or dependency download.
